violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the several sanitation buckets was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the chlorine must be (50-100) ppm. PIC switched out sanitation buckets at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Observed veggie prep sink with an air-break at time of inspection. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
